RepoName: WinCC OA GraphQL & REST API Server Example
Description: Application example for exposing WinCC OA data and functionality through a Node.js-based GraphQL and REST API server. It provides GraphQL queries, mutations and subscriptions, REST API endpoints, JWT-based authentication, direct access tokens, role-based authorization, and an integrated Swagger/OpenAPI interface for testing and exploration.

Subprojects.Name: WinCCOAGraphQLRestApisExample
Subprojects.Description: Subproject for the WinCC OA GraphQL and REST API Server including the Node.js-based API server implementation, configuration templates, authentication settings, and supporting JavaScript files.
